quicksight.topic.topicrelativedatefilter: A structure that represents a relative date filter.

quicksight.topic.topicrelativedatefilter.Description: The constant used in a relative date filter.
The function to be used in a relative date filter to determine the range of dates to include in the results. Valid values for this structure are `BEFORE`, `AFTER`, and `BETWEEN`.
The level of time precision that is used to aggregate `DateTime` values.
quicksight.topic.topicrelativedatefilter.Allowed values: DAY | HOUR | MINUTE | MONTH | QUARTER | SECOND | WEEK | YEAR
